title: Bitwise OR of All Subsequence Sums
titleCn: 所有子序列和的按位或

detail.title: Bitwise OR of All Subsequence Sums
hints: Think of each bit separately, i.e. try to figure out if ith bit is set in the answer.
ith bit is set in the answer if it's set in one of the array elements or it can be made using some of them.
Try to sum up lower bits and make higher bits.
